name: David Wilson Brown for Congress
subject: Location Change for Tomorrow's Event
body:
| | | | [ ](http://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=9LcC8&m=hOT0roTuLyUjRo6&b=rDzyccwqdag925aPgRVwZQ)

**Dear Friends,**
**
**
**The location has changed for the Buncombe County campaign kickoff event scheduled for tomorrow, due to flooding in Carrier Park. Please come to the Buncombe County Party Headquarters at 951 Old Fairview Road in Asheville at 2pm on Sunday June 3rd for our Meet & Greet.
**
**
**
**Now’s the time to come together and do the real work it will take to win, which we WILL this November. I look forward to seeing you Sunday, listening to your concerns, and sharing my vision for better healthcare, schools, jobs, and so much more.**
**
**
**Food (including vegan and vegetarian options), desserts and drinks will be served at this family-friendly event.**
**
**
**After our event, the Buncombe County Democratic Party will have their Spring Celebration at the same location from 4pm-5pm. Let's make Sunday a big day for Democrats in Buncombe County!
**
**
**
**See you soon!**

****

**David Wilson Brown**
**Democratic 10th Congressional District Candidate**

PO Box 351
Mc Adenville NC 28101
USA

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479b31c79e1e8718ef2cc645438cacdb081bbc58c60083148a4bd46927bd46655cc78c3e612d84303148ee5e684fa2abe2f5
We Ran Out of Words to Describe How Good the Jobs Numbers Are

- The New York Times

“The real question in analyzing the May jobs numbers released Friday is whether there are enough synonyms for ‘good’ in an online thesaurus to describe them adequately,” Neil Irwin writes in The New York Times. The economy added 223,000 jobs in May as unemployment reached its lowest level in 18 years.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479b96c876f2112c8b862786d8149c3604510ccfa3772dd5714d5d48904fb3393bf354e8b607eb7fccf507089e54c2997dae

Secretary Betsy DeVos: Positive Schools Are Safe Schools

- The Baltimore Sun

“No student, no parent, no teacher should have to worry about their safety at school. Enough is enough,” Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos says. “To help local communities prevent future tragedies, President Trump asked me to chair the Federal Commission on School Safety, alongside fellow commissioners Attorney General Jeff Sessions, Secretary of Health and Human Services Alex Azar and Secretary of Homeland Security Kirstjen Nielsen.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479b610dc642008cde2a5d4fd031ced27b3aed112efbcbfdf44c6c183e2fc770712b2dcd509b00c82b1650b2bff504d0c90c

Donald Trump's Steel, Aluminum Tariffs Lift Low and Moderate Income Families

- USA Today

This week, President Trump announced steel and aluminum tariffs on Canada, Mexico, and the European Union to address U.S. national security concerns stemming from global oversupply. Peter Navarro, Director of the White House’s National Trade Council, says the President’s actions are bringing much-needed jobs to destitute towns across the country.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479beae8e3e16188a85b3feceb6f4cc885d78450b9ddf92e5bd034f1a4ab60c4f2cb55d113726134c4d7b6a4a03b5902256f

U.S. Back at No. 1 Competitiveness Ranking — Will Trump's Critics Ever Admit to Being Wrong?

- Investor’s Business Daily

The United States leapt three countries to take the no. 1 spot on the Swiss IMD Competitiveness Center’s 2018 global rankings. “Have Donald Trump's policies had a big impact on the U.S. economy and its competitiveness?” asks the Investor’s Business Daily editorial board. “The answer, we think, is an obvious yes.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479b4f2cb19c93acdd4ef93a8e074b1a5a5b85fc3a43648af38ab5af684ad417426ea95c71832f45b34dede2a74afb8c22a8

Let’s Make Alaska Home of the Next Big Idea

- Anchorage Daily News

“If national parks were America’s best idea, National Labs were our smartest,” Sen. Lisa Murkowski (R-AK) and Secretary of Energy Rick Perry write. “During the next few days, the University of Alaska will host a unique event that brings dozens of the world’s best and brightest scientists to Fairbanks.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479b3aab65cc82c9cc44b14be4c4fe82bfc5f7e00d423457cfde55af605c0b06e78e5659d591fd4c3d0278ea0ba1238ad479

U.S. Households, Businesses See Good Times Ahead: Fed

- Reuters

“Households are feeling more stable, small businesses are making money and many expect to expand and hire in the coming year, signs of continued optimism in two key parts of the economy, the Federal Reserve reported Tuesday,” Howard Schneider and Jason Lange write for Reuters. Nearly three-quarters of U.S. adults today said they are financially comfortable.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479bf3e40eaaeac44d3128cde4ed16d04e9355c28eed72ffc5a3b837a634a6caa31f1515d9b08276f97d8b625da878a07c9c

We Didn’t Lose 1,500 Migrant Children. Most Are with Family.

- USA Today

A recent column claiming that Federal authorities “lost” 1,475 migrant children misrepresents a serious challenge for America’s immigration system, Deputy Health and Human Services Secretary Eric Hargan writes. “By [the column’s] logic, before the check-ins began in 2016, the Obama administration had ‘lost’ almost every one of the tens of thousands of children they released to sponsors,” Hargan explains.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479b33891de8704f4686424c6fba9e8334e1f62c0e46181db38eea6d791abd46378a6147dbd5325dea36c2e8fb96a61f7fb1

A Record Month for Raises

- The Wall Street Journal

“The number of small companies raising wages hit a record high in the U.S. this month,” James Freeman reports for The Wall Street Journal. “This week also brought news suggesting that paychecks across the entire U.S. economy will be getting larger in the future.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479b372fee313832c55b2c33350fd8852bce50b8437000184af9c6edd16db77a08deee0d5d97b0ab8ac157310b6f5848756d
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=59cc7a609656479b2215fb7a79606e0d00ecafc07fda6a1a9fa41b1c865be02278388555e2063bfabaa697656888b36ba97b7239a735a5c5
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4cabcf15ca007d4b071a9c47aa3f673bcae699282a23718b8ee035109ef46d507c817803f02341e9a518c89dde3f1fd983ded4cba0c785308
Unsubscribe

name: Tom Perez
subject: I've got some good news to share, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors have made it possible to bring about the transformational change that this organization requires at this moment.
---
Today I'm proud to report that we exceeded our May monthly fundraising goal. This is further proof that when Democrats like you across the country come together to fight for our values, there is nothing we can't accomplish.

As you know, the DNC is doing things a bit differently than we've done in the past. We are investing in Democratic candidates up and down the ballot -- not just those at the top of the ticket. We are committed to strengthening state parties and winning back power at the local level. We are competing in races and districts where Democrats wouldn't have even attempted running in years past. Plus, we're building an unprecedented grassroots organizing infrastructure that will ensure Democrats can continue celebrating big victories in the years to come.

**Hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors have made it possible to bring about the transformational change that is required at this moment.** Our party has come a long way in the past year -- we had to face some hard truths and find a way to move forward together. But today we are committed as ever to advancing the progressive values we all share and electing Democrats who will defend those values at every level of government.

Now it's time to stay focused on the fight ahead. This fall, we have a chance to regain a Democratic majority in Congress, win back state legislatures, and elect the next generation of leaders who will move our party forward in the years to come.

There's a lot at stake this year -- but I'm feeling good about our chances in November knowing that you're a part of this team.

All my best,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Thanks for supporting our party.

There's a lot at stake this year -- but I'm feeling good about our chances in November knowing that you're a part of this team. subject: ✐ Sign your name: 10,000 people standing with Planned Parenthood

| | Under new rules from the Trump administration, women's health clinics will lose federal funding.

Women (and men, frankly) will get less care if these rules go into place. We have to fight back to protect Americans' access to health care.

[We're collecting 10,000 signatures to push back against this new rule so that health centers that provide life-saving care can keep their doors open. Sign our petition today >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13cd/3e0906/6489c32c/3e342ba3/816046961/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Save-Planned-Parenthood?source=20180602_1_PET_TEAM_Planned-Parenthood&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Wersquore+collecting+10000+signatures+to&utm_campaign=20180602_1_PET_TEAM_Planned-Parenthood")

This isn't just a partisan attack on Planned Parenthood - it's an attack on the more than 140 health centers right here in Virginia that rely on federal funding to provide preventive health care to people across the Commonwealth.

Health centers affected by this rule provide critical care, from cancer screenings to preventive health education, and cutting people off from life-saving information will never be an American value.

But as with many things, this could slip to the back burner of yet another chaotic news cycle. We won't let it.

[Sign your name to defend women's health clinics from losing funding due to this new partisan rule from the the Trump administration >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13cd/3e0906/6489c32c/3e342ba2/816046961/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Save-Planned-Parenthood?source=20180602_1_PET_TEAM_Planned-Parenthood&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Sign+your+name+to+defend+womenrsquos+hea&utm_campaign=20180602_1_PET_TEAM_Planned-Parenthood")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6762/51dbcc2a/76ccf9c/3a2eada/3137960598/VEsH/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")

The Senate majority is on the line in this race, team, and right now, we're putting that at risk.

With the Senate majority, Democrats will be able to stop the most dangerous and divisive pieces of President Trump's agenda. They'll be able to prevent additional attacks on the Affordable Care Act, to push votes on universal background checks and other commonsense safety measures and to prevent the president's most unqualified nominees from taking office. But the path to gaining that majority depends on winning here in Pennsylvania, and to be honest with you, we're not doing the best we could.

**_[We fell short of our fundraising goal in May, which means our campaign budget is on the chopping block. Chipping in $5 or whatever you can, right now, will help us run the best possible campaign to re-elect Bob Casey and take back the Senate.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6762/51dbcc2a/76ccf9c/3a2eadb/3137960598/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwMl9mcjFfbmRfVjFTMiIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180602_fr1_nd_V1S2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

name: Joe
subject: everything but the kitchen sink
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
If you don't take action today, Indiana's next senator will be a copy machine for every one of the president's policies, no matter the impact it has on Hoosier families |
---

| | Peter:

I know I've been asking a lot lately, but there's a reason. **Unaccountable dark money groups made up of mysterious, wealthy donors from outside Indiana are throwing everything at me but the kitchen sink.** Their candidate, Rep. Braun, believes the president can do no wrong -- and they'll spend millions trying to get him to the Senate where he can be a copy machine for their agenda.

But I'm Indiana's hired help, not an office appliance. I'll always take the time to look at how every bill that comes across my desk affects Hoosiers. If it helps Hoosiers, I'm for it. If it doesn't, I'm against it. I only answer to you.

**Peter, if you don 't take action today, Indiana's next senator will be a copy machine for every one of the president's policies, no matter the impact it has on Hoosier families. Will you chip in to help us stop that from happening?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: New way
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3078/9e00690/4793d702/2402335f/2401774661/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180601_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180601_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Friends,

First of all, thank you for all of the support you've given me over the course of this campaign.

If it wasn't for your helping hand, I wouldn't be here, writing to you as a candidate for Governor, without your continued support.

In the final few months to the primary, it's going to take a lot of power, hard work and determination to ensure we have a Governor who can rebuild Florida after Governor Rick Scott's eight years in office -- but after the month we've had, I'm more confident than ever that we're going to do it.

This month, and every month since our campaign's launch, we not only proved it was possible to fund a campaign with the power of small-dollar online donors -- we also proved that Floridians are ready for new, progressive leadership.

We're getting rid of the old ways of doing business -- and I couldn't be more excited to see what we are going to accomplish together next.

So again, from the bottom of my heart, thank you.

Bring it home,

Andrew

name: Senator Tina Smith
subject: This team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
A personal message for you. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b675/c1f7015/686a5e19/114283e9/1213121651/VEsH/ "https://tinaforminnesota.com/") Friend, I want to say thank you to everyone who has supported this campaign and will continue to fight with us as we head towards November. And after last night's endorsement from Minnesota DFLers, I know we're strong, organized, and ready to win. But, let's not forget: Donald Trump and the Republicans are doing everything they can to turn Minnesota red. They've got millions of dollars in the bank. Our state is at the top of their target list. And they've got a whole bunch of nasty attack ads ready to go. **So, let me just say to this President, to the Koch brothers, to Mitch McConnell, and to anyone else planning on taking this seat: I 'm not afraid of you -- because I'm not in this fight alone. ** This team is strong, hardworking, dedicated, and we are willing to fight for the values we share. Because we believe that every family deserves a shot at success -- not just those at the top. And that no one should go through a medical emergency and end up living in fear of going bankrupt. And most importantly, as Paul Wellstone said, we believe that we all do better when we _ALL_ do better. We've got the next 5 months to show everyone how important these values are and how critical it is to have them represented in the U.S. Senate. This starts right now. Let's go, Tina **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b675/c1f7015/686a5e19/114283ea/1213121651/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email?refcode=rtw_180602_convention_em")**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Martinez’s political fixer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
| | | Friend,

We’ve been warning that special interest money will begin flooding New Mexico, and we’re starting to see the first waves of it.

My friend Garrett VeneKlasen is running for New Mexico Land Commissioner, and he just learned over $100,000 in special interest money is being spent against him.

**Susana Martinez’s political fixer, Jay McCleskey, is behind the spending and looking to spend Garrett’s opponent to victory this year.**

**[Garrett will be a champion for our public lands if elected, which is why special interests are already throwing so much money into the race to defeat him. Can you contribute to Garrett’s campaign so he can fight back against these latest attacks?](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/AAE/ni0YAA/t.2hz/3bp4yc3sSRqCD6pRUCVQFw/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHPsCQLgoA-2BULVdDxhxgREoH-2FfqbNvXIiTJTpHEfCLOM27OnoqDiC-2FfxuEj2WCPctBIOMHSmCQ2d4vPY4wE6qZO-2By1EdAO1SoQfCbrgSNfGLqXQippXrCpMfEUcHCQi0wFpbqjCjQH6lNE5S6dbCE5AJbOtcHO2eTZlafp1-2BIfax2fZu7MPWsuncgXxvUZYa7GsIlFUfMI2Am04YrPTgLXcug69Q0m21kbqtK8OuX-2FCBWFPapFnVN-2F5Hxmyh4dBd3ixsvhtXjKEOwBShvL7bYwPsAFhynf56YITds8G-2FQJpw-3D-3D)**

subject: Peter - I'm asking for your help to get on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
There has never been a more important time for all of us to step up and claim our role in shaping the future of our democracy.
#
We have an extraordinary opportunity, Peter.
Through this campaign for Attorney General, we have a chance to root out corruption in Albany, serve as a check on the lawlessness in the White House, and to go right after the corporate greed and monopolies that pose a fundamental threat to our democracy.
But I cannot do that alone. All of us have a role to play in this fight.
And our first task is organizing and petitioning to get on the ballot. A number of people have committed to help. But it's a tall task, and I need you with us. So what do you say?
**[Say you'll volunteer to help us petition to get on the ballot. Just add your name right now, and someone from my team will be in touch soon.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e28/6e822e2f/1890e5ee/41721268/1217512330/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/petition-volunteer?source=em180602-full")**
There has never been a more important time for all of us to step up and claim our role in shaping the future of our democracy.
The history books will look back at what all of us did to stop the unchecked greed and lawlessness in our state, and in our country. **You don 't have to be a bystander in that story; I am asking you to be an author.**
Say you will. Join us in our petition drive to get on the ballot:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/petition-volunteer](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e28/6e822e2f/1890e5ee/41721268/1217512330/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/petition-volunteer?source=em180602-full")**
I can't wait to thank you in person for collecting signatures with me.
\- Zephyr Teachout

subject: before anything else, thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Peter ,
I just want to thank you so, so much for supporting me in this campaign.
When I started this journey, I had no idea whether my people-focused ideas would catch on or not. I had no idea whether people would be interested in a grassroots campaign where they, not special interests and dirty attacks, were the power behind the campaign.
I had no idea how this campaign would go. But from the very first day, you had my back and this has become our shared movement. I cannot express in words how humbled I’ve been by your support.
We have only four days to go before the primary. Let’s get across the finish line and prepare to face Tom McClintock in November!
Yours,
Regina

| | Woof woof Peter,

**It 's Get Out The Vote (GOTV) weekend! That means we're doggone close to Election Day!**

As Team Caforio's own Director of Ground Game (D.O.G.G.), I've been hard at work leading the dog pack here in CA-25.

It's been so much fun leading Bryan, our field team, and our volunteers across every corner of the district, from Simi Valley to Santa Clarita to the Antelope Valley. We pawssibly have the best volunteers in the country!

I'm not the only one wagging my tail in excitement about this campaign. I've been doing lots and lots of sniffing around CA-25 and there's one thing I know -- people are woofing hard for Bryan! It's fur'real pretty pawsome.

It's GOTV weekend, Peter, and it's all-paws-on-deck. Can you lend us your paw and help us come out on top?

* [**_If you 're nearby, use your paw to click here and sign up for a volunteer shift (maybe we can go door to door together)_**](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d3843b1/169f49de/342c494c/33865ae8/3442511370/VEsE/ "https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/s/volunteer-for-bryan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=2+-+If+yoursquore+nearby+use+your+paw+to+cli&utm_campaign=BC_EM_HOL_90DO_180528&source=BC_EM_HOL_90DO_180528&refcode=BC_EM_ENG_90DO_180603")
* [**_Use your paw to click here and support our GOTV Victory Fund_**](https://secure.bryancaforio. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bc-one-week?refcode=BC_EM_ENG_90DO_180603&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=3+-+Use+your+paw+to+click+here+and+support+o&utm_campaign=BC_EM_HOL_90DO_180528&source=BC_EM_HOL_90DO_180528")
* [**_And if you 're in CA-25, use your paw to go here and find your polling place so that you can vote for Bryan on Tuesday_**](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d3843b1/169f49de/342c494c/33865ae6/3442511370/VEsC/ "http://www.sos.ca.gov/elections/polling-place/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=4+-+And+if+yoursquore+in+CA25+use+your+paw+t&utm_campaign=BC_EM_HOL_90DO_180528&source=BC_EM_HOL_90DO_180528&refcode=BC_EM_ENG_90DO_180603")

Steve Knight is friends with Donald Trump -- GRRRRR! Tail me about it -- that's ruff and unfurgivable!

Whereas Bryan? He takes me for the best walks, pets me, feeds me treats, and will advocate for progressive values no matter what. Now that's something we can all wag our tails about!

Wag'onna win this together. I know it!

See you at the dog park,

DOGG

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chanel=20Rion?=
subject: If Not for the Korean War...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| _**Our freedoms and our very existence are made possible by the grace of God and by those who serve in uniform.**_

I would not be here today were it not for the Korean war of yesterday.

My grandparents grew up in a Korea held captive by the Japanese. Liberation from Japan was shortlived when the Communists decided to invade the south in what we recall now as the Korean War -- the Forgotten War.

[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=15e0722297&e=9da9b0ca31)

**Were it not for the leadership of America at that pivotal time to intervene, to defy the scourge of communism **growing, mold-like over our land, my father would never have found my mother decades later in a free and prosperous South Korea; my family would never have been.

I reflect with immense pride and gratitude that we carry on the memories of those who sacrificed everything to make today possible.

Both Courtland's grandfather served in Korea, and mine. My grandfather, "Haraboji," was enlisted to fight at 16. I regret immensely his reticence about that time and I treasure everyday, especially on the campaign trail that I find a Korean war veteran willing to share his memories of this time.

[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=15e0722297&e=9da9b0ca31)

I carry with me the memory of my grandparents, I treasure their courage. I treasure my heritage and I watch with joy as **President Trump opens an unprecedented diplomatic path toward the denuclearization of North Korea.**

Courtland and I had the great pleasure to celebrate and commemorate Bass Pro Shop's Johnny Morris' contribution to [the Korean War Memorial at College of the Ozark's Patriot Park in Southwest Missouri](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=f194274160&e=9da9b0ca31). The community is stronger for such patriots and their remembrance of our past. Support these great institutions and [remember to visit](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=d1f70c1d98&e=9da9b0ca31) and celebrate their impact on our community, our country, and our memory.

God Bless these times. God Bless strong leadership, the United States of America, and God Bless men who take a stand against evil of every kind.

Chanel Rion

name: M. Kelly
subject: Question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Friends,
Every student should have access to a quality education and a path to success. But Betsy DeVos and Chris Sununu want to rob New Hampshire's students of that opportunity. Sununu even appointed an education commissioner more extreme than DeVos.
They're working to slash public school funding to pay for religious and private school voucher programs - which would weaken our public education system and devastate our cities by forcing them to raise property taxes.
New Hampshire deserves better - and most importantly, our kids deserve better. That's why, as governor, I'll veto any plan that takes funding away from our public schools to pay for vouchers for private or religious schools.
**I will continue to fight back against Betsy DeVos and Chris Sununu's disastrous agenda, but I need to hear from 3,500 folks before midnight:**
| | **Do you approve of Betsy DeVos?**
